subcodes.first_line: O thou wanderer over mountain and desert in the Path of the kind Beloved! Thy letter, after thy return from California
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سرگشته کوه و بیابان در راه یار مهربان نامه شما بعد از رجوع از کالیفورنیا
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @unity; oneness of humanity, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @newspapers and the media; publications
